title: Chinese Rice Stuffing
description: A traditional sticky rice stuffing with Chinese sausage and mushrooms, perfect for special occasions and family gatherings.
instructions: Wash both rices thoroughly under cold water
In an 8qt pot, bring water to boil, add rice, then lower heat and simmer for 15 minutes
Steam rice for 10 minutes until fully cooked
Soak shiitake mushrooms in hot water to rehydrate, then chop finely and save the mushroom liquid
Cut Chinese sausages into quarters lengthwise, then cut into 1/4" pieces
Sauté sausages and mushrooms together for 5 minutes until fragrant
Spread cooked rice in a large roasting pan
Top with sausage mixture and half of the chopped cilantro and green onions
Sprinkle oyster sauce over the top
Mix soy sauce with sesame oil and pour over the rice
Mix everything together with your hands until well combined
Top with remaining green onions and cilantro before serving
tips: Use authentic sticky rice for best texture and flavor
Don't skip soaking the mushrooms - the liquid adds great umami flavor
Mix with hands while still warm for best distribution of flavors
Can be made ahead and reheated in the oven
